title: lithocarpus dinhensis
intro: Lithocarpus dinhensis, also known as the Dinh's copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus dinhensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
